title: Login page error
description: Customer unable to login despite using correct credentials; reset password attempts fail repeatedly with no success.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Payment attempts keep failing due to card being declined, balance insufficient, or gateway timeout issues.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: User cannot download January invoice from the billing section; download button shows error and file missing.

title: Dashboard stats incorrect
description: TDashboard statistics show incorrect data; order counts and revenue numbers are mismatched across different pages.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: Email notifications not being sent to customers after order confirmation or password reset requests fail.

title: Search feature slow
description: Product search function is very slow; results take more than 10 seconds to display on the page.

title: Password reset link broken
description: Password reset link in emails is broken; users cannot reset their account passwords successfully online.

title: Mobile layout issues
description: Website layout breaks on mobile devices; buttons, images, and text overlap in small screen resolutions.

title: Incorrect invoice amount
description: Invoices display wrong totals; some discounts or taxes are not applied correctly in customer billing.

title: Slow image upload
description: Uploading images for products takes excessive time, sometimes failing to complete, frustrating the user.
